mapper.select: SELECT c.CC_SEQ, c.FAMILY_ID, c.CC_NM, c.CC_TYPE, c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, c.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, p.PLAN_NM AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, c.MONTHLY_AMT, c.SORT_ORDER, c.USE_YN, c.DEL_YN, c.MEMO, c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.UPD_ID, c.UPD_DT, 0 AS USED_COUNT FROM COST_CENTER_MST c LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p ON p.PLAN_SEQ = c.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ AND p.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE c.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND c.CC_SEQ = #{ccSeq} AND c.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT CC_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, CC_NM, CC_TYPE, SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, SOURCE_ASSET_SEQ, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, NULL AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, MONTHLY_AMT, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DEL_YN, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT, 0 AS USED_COUNT FROM COST_CENTER_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND SOURCE_ASSET_SEQ = #{sourceAssetSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT CC_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, CC_NM, CC_TYPE, SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, SOURCE_ASSET_SEQ, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, NULL AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, MONTHLY_AMT, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DEL_YN, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT, 0 AS USED_COUNT FROM COST_CENTER_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND INCOME_PLAN_SEQ = #{incomePlanSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT CC_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, CC_NM, CC_TYPE, SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, NULL AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, MONTHLY_AMT, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DEL_YN, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT, 0 AS USED_COUNT FROM COST_CENTER_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ = #{sourcePlanSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COST_CENTER_MST (FAMILY_ID, CC_NM, CC_TYPE, SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, SOURCE_ASSET_SEQ, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, MONTHLY_AMT, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DEL_YN, MEMO, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{ccNm}, #{ccType}, #{sourcePlanSeq}, #{sourceAssetSeq}, #{incomePlanSeq}, COALESCE(#{monthlyAmt}, 0), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), 'N', #{memo}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE COST_CENTER_MST SET CC_NM = #{ccNm}, INCOME_PLAN_SEQ = #{incomePlanSeq}, MONTHLY_AMT = COALESCE(#{monthlyAmt}, 0), SORT_ORDER = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, SORT_ORDER), USE_YN = COALESCE(#{useYn}, USE_YN), MEMO = #{memo}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND CC_SEQ = #{ccSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE COST_CENTER_MST SET DEL_YN = 'Y', UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ = #{sourcePlanSeq} AND CC_TYPE = 'AUTO'
mapper.select: SELECT c.CC_SEQ, c.CC_NM, c.CC_TYPE, c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, c.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, ip.PLAN_NM AS INCOME_PLAN_NM, COALESCE(ip.AMOUNT, 0) AS INCOME_MONTHLY_AMT, COALESCE(SUM(ep.AMOUNT), 0) AS EXPENSE_MONTHLY_AMT, COUNT(ep.PLAN_SEQ) AS EXPENSE_CNT FROM COST_CENTER_MST c LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST ip ON ip.PLAN_SEQ = c.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ AND ip.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST ep ON ep.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ep.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ( (ep.COST_CENTER_TYPE = 'CC' AND ep.COST_CENTER_SEQ = c.CC_SEQ) OR (c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ IS NOT NULL AND ep.PLAN_SEQ = c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ) ) WHERE c.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND c.DEL_YN = 'N' AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY c.CC_SEQ, c.CC_NM, c.CC_TYPE, c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ, c.INCOME_PLAN_SEQ, ip.PLAN_NM, ip.AMOUNT ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER, c.CC_SEQ

SELECT c.CC_SEQ AS costCenterSeq, p.PLAN_SEQ AS planSeq, p.PLAN_NM AS planNm, p.FLOW_TYPE AS flowType, COALESCE(t.PLAN_TYPE_NM, p.FLOW_TYPE) AS planTypeNm, p.AMOUNT AS amount, p.CYCLE_NUM AS cycleNum, p.CYCLE_UNIT AS cycleUnit, CONCAT('매 ', p.CYCLE_NUM, CASE p.CYCLE_UNIT WHEN 'DAY' THEN '일' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN '개월' WHEN 'YEAR' THEN '년' ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN p.CYCLE_UNIT = 'YEAR' AND p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' ', p.CYCLE_BASE_MONTH, '월') ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' ', p.CYCLE_BASE_DAY, '일') ELSE '' END ) AS cycleDesc, p.USE_YN AS useYn FROM COST_CENTER_MST c INNER JOIN CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST p ON p.FAMILY_ID = c.FAMILY_ID AND p.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ( (p.COST_CENTER_TYPE = 'CC' AND p.COST_CENTER_SEQ = c.CC_SEQ) OR (c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ IS NOT NULL AND p.PLAN_SEQ = c.SOURCE_PLAN_SEQ) ) LEFT JOIN CASH_FLOW_TYPE_CD t ON t.PLAN_TYPE = p.PLAN_TYPE WHERE c.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND c.DEL_YN = 'N' AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.CC_SEQ, p.FLOW_TYPE, p.PLAN_SEQ
